adaptability: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
aftermath: Damages the attacker landing the finishing blow.
analytic: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.
angerpoint: Maxes Attack after taking a critical hit.
armortail: Prevents the opponent from using priority moves.
aromalive: Cures status conditions of allies on switch-in.
asone: Combines Unnerve and Chilling Neigh/Grim Neigh.
aura_break: Reverses the effects of Aura abilities.
baddreams: Reduces the HP of sleeping opposing Pokémon.
ballfetch: Fetches the first failed Poké Ball thrown.
battlearmor: Protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
battlebond: Transforms into Ash-Greninja after defeating a foe.
beastboost: Boosts the highest stat after defeating a foe.
berserk: Boosts Sp. Atk when HP becomes half or less.
bigpecks: Protects the Pokémon from Defense reduction.
blaze: Powers up Fire-type moves when HP is low.
bulletproof: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.
cheekpouch: Restores HP as well when a Berry is consumed.
chlorophyll: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed in sunshine.
clearbody: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.
colorchange: Changes the Pokémon's type to the foe's move.
comatose: The Pokémon is always drowsy and can attack while asleep.
competitive: Boosts Sp. Atk when a stat is lowered.
corrosion: The Pokémon can poison Steel and Poison types.
cursedbody: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.
cutecharm: Contact with the Pokémon may cause infatuation.
damp: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves.
dancer: Copies dance moves used by any Pokémon.
darkaura: Powers up Dark-type moves for all Pokémon.
dauntlessshield: Boosts Defense when the Pokémon enters battle.
dazzling: Surprises the foe and prevents priority moves.
defeatist: Halves stats when HP becomes half or less.
defiant: Boosts Attack when a stat is lowered.
deltastream: Affects weather and eliminates Flying-type weaknesses.
desolateland: Affects weather and eliminates Water-type moves.
disguise: Protects the Pokémon from one hit.
download: Adjusts power based on the foe's stats.
drizzle: Summons rain when the Pokémon enters battle.
drought: Summons sunshine when the Pokémon enters battle.
dryskin: Restores HP in rain or by Water moves, but takes damage in sun or from Fire moves.
earlybird: The Pokémon awakens quickly from sleep.
eartheater: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
effectspore: Contact may cause paralysis, poison, or sleep.
electricsurge: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain on switch-in.
emergencyexit: Switches out when HP becomes half or less.
fairyaura: Powers up Fairy-type moves for all Pokémon.
filter: Reduces damage from super effective attacks.
flamebody: Contact with the Pokémon may burn the attacker.
flareboost: Boosts Sp. Atk when the Pokémon is burned.
flashfire: Powers up Fire-type moves if hit by fire.
flowerveil: Protects Grass-type allies from stat reduction.
fluffy: Halves damage from contact moves, but doubles Fire damage.
forewarn: Determines what moves a foe has.
frisk: The Pokémon can check a foe's held item.
fullmetalbody: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.
galewings: Gives priority to Flying-type moves when HP is full.
gluttony: Makes the Pokémon eat a held Berry early.
goodasgold: Protects the Pokémon from status moves.
gooey: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed.
gorillatactics: Boosts Attack but only allows one move.
grassysurge: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain on switch-in.
grimneigh: Boosts Sp. Atk after defeating a foe.
guarddog: Boosts Attack if intimidated and prevents switching.
gulpmissile: Catches prey when using Surf or Dive.
guts: Boosts Attack if there is a status condition.
harvest: May create another Berry after one is used.
healer: May heal an ally's status conditions.
heatproof: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.
honeygather: The Pokémon may gather Honey after a battle.
hustle: Boosts the Attack stat, but lowers accuracy.
hydration: Heals status conditions if it is raining.
hypercutter: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering Attack.
icebody: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in a hailstorm.
iceface: Protects the Pokémon from one physical hit.
illuminate: Raises the likelihood of meeting wild Pokémon.
illusion: Enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in the party.
immunity: Prevents the Pokémon from getting poisoned.
imposter: The Pokémon transforms itself into the foe.
infiltrator: Passes through the foe's barrier and strikes.
innardsout: Damages the attacker landing the finishing blow.
innerfocus: The Pokémon is protected from flinching.
insomnia: Prevents the Pokémon from falling asleep.
intimidate: Lowers the foe's Attack stat on switch-in.
intrepidsword: Boosts Attack when the Pokémon enters battle.
ironbarbs: Inflicts damage to the attacker on contact.
ironfist: Boosts the power of punching moves.
justified: Boosts Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.
keeneye: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering accuracy.
klutz: The Pokémon can't use any held items.
levitate: Gives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
lightningrod: Draws in all Electric-type moves to up Sp. Atk.
limber: Prevents the Pokémon from being paralyzed.
liquidooze: Damages attackers using any draining move.
longreach: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact.
magicguard: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.
magician: The Pokémon steals the held item of a foe it hits.
magmaarmor: Prevents the Pokémon from becoming frozen.
marvelscale: Boosts Defense if there is a status condition.
merciless: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits against poisoned targets.
minus: Boosts Sp. Atk if another Pokémon has Plus or Minus.
mistysurge: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain on switch-in.
moldbreaker: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.
moody: Raises one stat and lowers another each turn.
motordrive: Boosts Speed if hit by an Electric-type move.
moxie: Boosts Attack after defeating a foe.
multiscale: Reduces damage when HP is full.
multitype: Changes type to match the held Plate.
mummy: Contact with the Pokémon spreads this Ability.
naturalcure: All status conditions heal when the Pokémon switches out.
neuroforce: Powers up moves that are super effective.
neutralizinggas: Neutralizes the Abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
noguard: Ensures the Pokémon's and the foe's moves land.
normalize: All the Pokémon's moves become Normal-type.
oblivious: Prevents the Pokémon from being infatuated or taunted.
overcoat: Protects the Pokémon from weather and powder.
overgrow: Powers up Grass-type moves when HP is low.
owntempo: Prevents the Pokémon from becoming confused.
parentalbond: The parent and child attack together.
pastelveil: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.
perishbody: Both the Pokémon and the attacker faint in three turns.
pickpocket: Steals an item from an attacker that made contact.
pickup: The Pokémon may pick up items.
plus: Boosts Sp. Atk if another Pokémon has Plus or Minus.
poisonheal: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.
poisonpoint: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.
poisontouch: May poison a target when the Pokémon makes contact.
powerconstruct: Changes form when HP is half or less.
powerofalchemy: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.
powerspot: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.
prankster: Gives priority to a status move.
pressure: The Pokémon raises the foe's PP usage.
primordialsea: Affects weather and eliminates Fire-type moves.
prismarmor: Reduces damage from super effective attacks.
propellertail: Ignores effects that draw in moves.
protean: Changes the Pokémon's type to the move it's about to use.
psychicsurge: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain on switch-in.
punkrock: Boosts sound-based moves and reduces sound damage.
purifyingsalt: Protects from status conditions and halves Ghost damage.
quickfeet: Boosts Speed if there is a status condition.
raindish: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in rain.
rattled: Bug, Ghost, or Dark-type moves scare it and boost Speed.
receiver: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.
reckless: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.
regenerator: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.
ripen: Doubles the effect of a held Berry.
rivalry: Deals more damage to Pokémon of the same gender.
rkssystem: Changes type to match the held Memory.
rockhead: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.
roughskin: Inflicts damage to the attacker on contact.
runaway: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.
sandforce: Boosts certain moves' power in a sandstorm.
sandrush: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed in a sandstorm.
sandspit: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
sandstream: Summons a sandstorm when the Pokémon enters battle.
sandveil: Boosts the Pokémon's evasion in a sandstorm.
sapsipper: Boosts Attack if hit by a Grass-type move.
schooling: Forms a school when HP is high.
scrappy: Enables Ghost-type Pokémon to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves.
screencleaner: Removes screens from both sides of the field.
serenegrace: Boosts the likelihood of additional effects.
shadowshield: Reduces damage when HP is full.
shedskin: The Pokémon may heal its own status conditions.
sheerforce: Removes additional effects to increase move power.
shellarmor: Protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
shielddust: Blocks the additional effects of attacks.
shieldsdown: Changes form when HP is half or less.
skilllink: Maximizes the number of times multi-strike moves hit.
slushrush: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed in a hailstorm.
sniper: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.
snowwarning: Summons a hailstorm when the Pokémon enters battle.
solarpower: Boosts Sp. Atk in sunshine, but lowers HP.
solidrock: Reduces damage from super effective attacks.
soulheart: Boosts Sp. Atk after any Pokémon faints.
soundproof: Gives full immunity to all sound-based moves.
speedboost: The Pokémon's Speed stat is gradually boosted.
stakeout: Doubles damage to a target that has just switched in.
stall: The Pokémon moves after even slower Pokémon.
stalwart: Ignores effects that draw in moves.
stamina: Boosts Defense when hit by an attack.
stancechange: Changes form depending on whether it's attacking or defending.
static: Contact with the Pokémon may cause paralysis.
steadfast: Boosts Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.
steamengine: Maxes Speed if hit by Fire or Water moves.
stickyhold: Prevents other Pokémon from stealing its item.
stormdrain: Draws in all Water-type moves to up Sp. Atk.
sturdy: It cannot be knocked out with one hit.
suctioncups: Negates all moves that force switching out.
superluck: Heightens the critical-hit ratio of moves.
swarm: Powers up Bug-type moves when HP is low.
sweetveil: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from falling asleep.
swiftswim: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed in rain.
symbiosis: The Pokémon passes its item to an ally that has used its own.
synchronize: Passes a status condition to the Pokémon that caused it.
tangledfeet: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.
tanglinghair: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed.
technician: Powers up the Pokémon's weaker moves.
telepathy: Anticipates an ally's attack and dodges it.
teravolt: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.
thermalexchange: Boosts Attack when hit by a Fire-type move and prevents burn.
thickfat: Boosts resistance to Fire and Ice-type moves.
torrent: Powers up Water-type moves when HP is low.
truant: The Pokémon can't use a move the following turn.
turboblaze: Moves can be used regardless of Abilities.
unburden: Boosts Speed if a held item is used or lost.
unnerve: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.
unseenfist: Contact moves hit even if the target is protected.
victorystar: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.
vitalspirit: Prevents the Pokémon from falling asleep.
voltabsorb: Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move.
wanderingspirit: Swaps Abilities with a Pokémon on contact.
waterabsorb: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.
waterbubble: Halves Fire damage, prevents burn, and powers up Water moves.
watercompaction: Boosts Defense when hit by a Water-type move.
waterveil: Prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.
weakarmor: Physical attacks lower Defense and boost Speed.
whitesmoke: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.
wimpout: Switches out when HP becomes half or less.
wonderguard: Only super effective moves will hit.
wonderskin: Makes status moves more likely to miss.
zenmode: Changes form when HP is half or less.
